description: Hardening posture snapshot. Seed data for the L3 compliance_ops digest. In a real deployment this file is regenerated by an admin sweep; the digest reads whatever is here at 06:30 and reports green/yellow/red per the state field of each control.

controls.description: L2 BAA gate blocks PHI calls to unapproved vendors (CLAUDE.md rule 3).
controls.evidence: REQUIRE_BAA=true in env; 15 unit tests in tests/unit/test_baa_gate.py exercise deny + allow paths.

controls.description: L2 PHI redactor scans every message and tags phi_present + phi_tier (ADR-0006).
controls.evidence: REDACTION_MODE=strict in env; 22 unit tests in tests/unit/test_phi_redactor.py cover T1/T2/T3 detection.

controls.description: L2 injection sentinel is outermost guardrail with mode=block (ADR-0007).
controls.evidence: SENTINEL_MODE=block in env; 46 unit tests in tests/unit/test_injection_sentinel.py cover regex + LLM detection.

controls.description: APPROVED_PHI_VENDORS env is a fixed frozenset; new vendors require code review + env change.
controls.evidence: Only 'anthropic' and 'ollama' present in .env.example; addition path documented in ADR-0005.

controls.description: Every request carries a trace_id from L1 through L2-L6 for audit and debug.
controls.evidence: main.py /agents/echo synthesizes uuid if x-trace-id header absent; all L2 log lines include trace_id.

controls.description: Every LLM call is served by a prompt with a content-hash version (ADR-0009).
controls.evidence: L0_observability/prompt_registry ships in commit a69a267; drift log emits WARN on hash change.

controls.description: Production deployment forces HTTPS on all public endpoints.
controls.evidence: Demo build runs on localhost HTTP; production checklist item deferred to Phase 8 hardening pass.

controls.description: CORS origins limited to the admin UI hostname, not '*' (CLAUDE.md production standards).
controls.evidence: main.py CORSMiddleware allow_origins=['http://localhost:3000']; production values swap via env at deploy time.
